sentences.target: Heute mache ich einen Rundgang im Museum.
sentences.reading: /ˈhɔʏtə ˈmaxə ɪç ˈaɪnən ˈʁʊntɡaŋ ɪm muˈzeːʊm/

translations.de: Heute mache ich einen Rundgang im Museum.
translations.ipa: /ˈhɔʏtə ˈmaxə ɪç ˈaɪnən ˈʁʊntɡaŋ ɪm muˈzeːʊm/
translations.en: Today I’m doing a tour at the museum.
translations.es: Hoy hago un recorrido por el museo.
translations.fr: Aujourd’hui, je fais une visite du musée.
translations.it: Oggi faccio una visita al museo.
translations.ru: Сегодня я иду на экскурсию в музей.
translations.pt: Hoje vou fazer uma visita ao museu.
translations.vi: Hôm nay tôi đi tham quan bảo tàng.
translations.nl: Vandaag volg ik een rondleiding in het museum.
translations.uk: Сьогодні я йду на екскурсію до музею.
translations.hi: आज मैं संग्रहालय का दौरा कर रहा हूँ।
translations.el: Σήμερα κάνω μια ξενάγηση στο μουσείο.
translations.nb: I dag tar jeg en omvisning på museet.
translations.id: Hari ini saya ikut tur di museum.
translations.sv: I dag går jag på en visning på museet.
translations.ro: Astăzi fac un tur la muzeu.
translations.da: I dag tager jeg på rundvisning på museet.
translations.ja: 今日は博物館を見学します。

tokens.explanation: Temporal adverb indicating when the action takes place; modifies the whole clause.
Finite main verb, present tense, 1st person singular; takes a direct accusative object.
Personal pronoun, nominative, 1st person singular; subject of the clause.
Indefinite article, masculine accusative singular; determiner of the direct object.
Common noun, masculine, accusative singular; direct object (‘a tour/circuit’).
Contraction of the preposition ‘in’ + definite article ‘dem’; governs dative and marks location.
Common noun, neuter, dative singular; object of the preposition ‘im’ indicating place.

sentences.target: Der Rundgang beginnt gleich am Tor.

translations.de: Der Rundgang beginnt gleich am Tor.
translations.en: The tour starts right at the gate.
translations.es: El recorrido empieza justo en la puerta.
translations.fr: La visite commence juste devant la porte.
translations.it: La visita inizia proprio al cancello.
translations.pt: A visita começa logo no portão.
translations.vi: Chuyến tham quan bắt đầu ngay tại cổng.
translations.nl: De rondleiding begint direct bij de poort.
translations.hu: A túra közvetlenül a kapunál kezdődik.
translations.hi: दौरा बिल्कुल फाटक पर शुरू होता है।
translations.pl: Zwiedzanie zaczyna się tuż przy bramie.
translations.el: Η ξενάγηση ξεκινά ακριβώς στην πύλη.
translations.ja: ツアーは門のところで始まります。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine nominative singular; determiner of the subject.
Common noun, masculine, nominative singular; subject of the sentence.
Finite main verb, present tense, 3rd person singular; intransitive predicate.
Adverb; here an intensifier meaning ‘right/directly’ in the PP ‘gleich am Tor’.
Contraction of the preposition ‘an’ + definite article ‘dem’; governs dative and marks location.
Common noun, neuter, dative singular; object of the preposition ‘am’.

sentences.target: Wir treffen uns zum Rundgang am Brunnen.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈtʁɛfən ʊns tsʊm ˈʁʊntɡaŋ am ˈbʁʊnən/

translations.de: Wir treffen uns zum Rundgang am Brunnen.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈtʁɛfən ʊns tsʊm ˈʁʊntɡaŋ am ˈbʁʊnən/
translations.en: We’ll meet for the tour at the fountain.
translations.es: Nos vemos en la fuente para el recorrido.
translations.fr: On se retrouve à la fontaine pour la visite.
translations.it: Ci vediamo alla fontana per la visita.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在喷泉集合参加导览。
translations.yue: 我哋喺噴泉集合參加導賞。
translations.pt: Vamos nos encontrar na fonte para a visita.
translations.vi: Chúng ta sẽ gặp nhau ở đài phun nước để đi tham quan.
translations.ar: سنلتقي عند النافورة من أجل الجولة.
translations.nl: We spreken af bij de fontein voor de rondleiding.
translations.hi: हम दौरे के लिए फव्वारे के पास मिलेंगे।
translations.pl: Spotkamy się przy fontannie na zwiedzanie.
translations.el: Θα συναντηθούμε στο σιντριβάνι για την ξενάγηση.
translations.nb: Vi møtes ved fontenen for omvisningen.
translations.id: Kita akan bertemu di depan air mancur untuk tur.
translations.sv: Vi ses vid fontänen för visningen.
translations.ro: Ne întâlnim la fântână pentru tur.
translations.cs: Sejdeme se u fontány na prohlídku.
translations.da: Vi mødes ved springvandet til rundvisningen.
translations.ja: ツアーは噴水で集合します。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, nominative, 1st person plural; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present tense, 1st person plural; used reflexively here (‘sich treffen’ = to meet).
Reflexive pronoun, accusative, 1st person plural; coreferential with the subject in ‘wir treffen uns’.
Contraction of the preposition ‘zu’ + definite article ‘dem’; governs dative; marks purpose/occasion (‘for the tour’).
Common noun, masculine, dative singular; object of the preposition ‘zum’.
Contraction of the preposition ‘an’ + definite article ‘dem’; governs dative; marks location.
Common noun, masculine, dative singular; object of the preposition ‘am’.

sentences.target: Sie führt den Rundgang durch das Haus.
sentences.reading: /ziː fyːɐ̯t deːn ˈʁʊntɡaŋ dʊʁç das haʊ̯s/

translations.de: Sie führt den Rundgang durch das Haus.
translations.ipa: /ziː fyːɐ̯t deːn ˈʁʊntɡaŋ dʊʁç das haʊ̯s/
translations.en: She leads the tour through the house.
translations.es: Ella guía el recorrido por la casa.
translations.fr: Elle guide la visite dans la maison.
translations.it: Lei guida la visita per la casa.
translations.yue: 佢帶大家喺屋入面參觀。
translations.pt: Ela conduz a visita pela casa.
translations.vi: Cô ấy dẫn đoàn tham quan quanh ngôi nhà.
translations.nl: Ze leidt de rondleiding durch het huis.
translations.hu: Ő vezeti a túrát a házban.
translations.hi: वह घर का दौरा कराती है।
translations.el: Αυτή καθοδηγεί την ξενάγηση μέσα στο σπίτι.
translations.ja: 彼女が家の中を案内します。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, nominative, 3rd person singular (likely feminine from verb agreement); subject.
Finite main verb, present tense, 3rd person singular; transitive (‘to lead/conduct’).
Definite article, masculine accusative singular; determiner of the direct object.
Common noun, masculine, accusative singular; direct object of ‘führt’.
Preposition governing accusative; introduces a path/location phrase.
Definite article, neuter accusative singular; determiner of ‘Haus’.
Common noun, neuter, accusative singular; object of the preposition ‘durch’.

We’ll meet for the tour at the fountain.

es: Hoy hago un recorrido por el museo.
El recorrido empieza justo en la puerta.
Nos vemos en la fuente para el recorrido.
Ella guía el recorrido por la casa.
fr: Aujourd’hui, je fais une visite du musée.
La visite commence juste devant la porte.
On se retrouve à la fontaine pour la visite.
Elle guide la visite dans la maison.
it: Oggi faccio una visita al museo.
La visita inizia proprio al cancello.
Ci vediamo alla fontana per la visita.
Lei guida la visita per la casa.

yue: 我哋喺噴泉集合參加導賞。
佢帶大家喺屋入面參觀。

A visita começa logo no portão.

Ela conduz a visita pela casa.

Ze leidt de rondleiding durch het huis.

hu: A túra közvetlenül a kapunál kezdődik.
